zh.lifeSummary: 當David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll於1176年出生在蘇格蘭培爾埃羅爾時，他的父親Sir William II de la Haye46歲，母親Eva of Pitmilly36歲。他於1205年與Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn在蘇格蘭培爾卡斯 本 高萊結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1241年4月27日在英國蘇格蘭培爾享年65歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll于1176年出生在苏格兰培爾埃羅爾时，他的父亲Sir William II de la Haye46岁，母亲Eva of Pitmilly36岁。他于1205年与Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn在苏格兰培爾卡斯 本 高萊结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1241年4月27日在英国苏格兰培爾享年65岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Haye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Helmut, Willi.

North German, East Frisian, and Dutch: from a personal name, Frisian Hajo, ancient Germanic Haio; or from a short form of the female name Hadewig, composed of the elements hadu ‘battle, strife’ + wīg ‘war’.
German: variant of   Hey   4, 5.

variants.name: Deshayes
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by an enclosure, from the plural of Old French haye ‘hedge’ (see Haye and Hayes ), with fused preposition and definite article des ‘from the’; or a habitational name denoting someone from Les Hayes, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Deshaies .

variants.name: Hayenga
meanings: East Frisian: patronymic from the personal name Hajo (see Haye 1). It is formed with the suffix -enga, a variant of -inga (from the patronymic suffix -ing and genitive plural ending -a).

variants.name: Hey
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hay  .
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized (or archaic) and Flemish, of Heij, a topographic name for someone who lived on a heath, Dutch hei, heide.
German: metonymic occupational name for a grower or mower of grass, from Middle High German höu ‘grass, hay’.

variants.name: Hayen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse.  German Heinz, Wilhelm.
Flemish, East Frisian, and North German: patronymic from   Haye   1.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll was born in 1176, in Errol, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Sir William II de la Haye, was 46 and his mother, Eva of Pitmilly, was 36. He married Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn in 1205, in Carse of Gowrie, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 27 April 1241, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll est né en 1176, à Errol, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William II de la Haye, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Eva of Pitmilly, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn en 1205, à Carse of Gowrie, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 27 avril 1241, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll 1176 in Errol, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William II de la Haye 46 und seine Mutter Eva of Pitmilly 36. Er hat 1205 in Carse of Gowrie, Perthshire, Scotland Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 27. April 1241 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll è nato il nel 1176 nel Errol, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir William II de la Haye, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Eva of Pitmilly, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn nel 1205, nel Carse of Gowrie, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 27 aprile 1241, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: David de la Haye Second Lord of Errollが1176年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアエロルで生まれた時，父Sir William II de la Hayeは46歳，母Eva of Pitmillyは36歳であった。1205年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアカーゼ オフ ゴウリーでEithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1241年4月27日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで65歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll(이)가 1176년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 에럴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William II de la Haye(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva of Pitmilly(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1205년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 카스 프 가리에서 Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1241년 4월 27일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll nasceu em 1176, em Errol, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William II de la Haye, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Eva of Pitmilly, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn em 1205, em Carse of Gowrie, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 27 de abril de 1241, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll родился в 1176 г. в местности эррол, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir William II de la Haye было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva of Pitmilly, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn в 1205 г. в местности карс оф гоури, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 27 апреля 1241 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll nació en 1176, en Errol, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William II de la Haye, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Eva of Pitmilly, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn en 1205, en Carse of Gowrie, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 27 de abril de 1241, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
